notes: The Ghana Births & Deaths Registry integration (CHIM/Lightwave eTracker, base http://tracker.chimgh.org) is a private government API with no published OpenAPI or vendor docs. Spec synthesized from the adaptor's public operations and the mock client bundled in the adaptor's dist/index.cjs, which contains the real endpoint path (POST /api/notification) and verbatim sample request/response bodies. The generic get/post operations accept arbitrary resource paths; only the birth-notification endpoint is modeled in detail. Field names (including the source's typos like 'bith_attendant') are preserved as they appear in the adaptor.
